title: cirsium laniflorum
intro: Cirsium laniflorum, also known as the woolly thistle or cotton thistle, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is characterized by its woolly leaves and purple flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cirsium laniflorum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and support kidney function. Cirsium laniflorum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
